description: ATA Coder Community Plugin Index — the canonical list of installable plugins.

plugins.name: sample-formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format Python code on file write using black/ruff. Enforces consistent style across all agent-generated code.
plugins.author: ATA Coder Community

plugins.name: sql-linter
plugins.description: Lint and validate SQL queries in agent-generated code. Detects missing indexes, SELECT *, and SQL injection patterns.
plugins.author: DB Tools Community

plugins.name: git-conventional-commits
plugins.description: Enforce Conventional Commits format on all agent-generated commit messages. Validates feat/fix/chore prefixes and body format.
plugins.author: GitOps Community

plugins.name: docstring-generator
plugins.description: Auto-generate Google-style docstrings for all new Python functions. Detects missing/outdated docstrings and fills them in.
plugins.author: Docs Community

plugins.name: test-generator
plugins.description: Auto-generate pytest unit tests for new or modified functions. Analyzes function signatures and generates edge-case coverage.
plugins.author: Testing Community

plugins.name: todo-tracker
plugins.description: Track TODO/FIXME/HACK comments across the codebase. Generates a report with file locations, ages, and suggested priorities.
plugins.author: PM Tools Community
